title: carex × halophila subsp. cryptocarpa
intro: Carex × halophila subsp. cryptocarpa, also known as salt-sedge, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to Australia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Carex × halophila subsp. cryptocarpa include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a medical professional.
